titleStmt.title: SII 23.122: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 122. (A.R. No. 122 of 1907.) Āḻvārkuṟichchi, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District Vaṉṉiyappar temple—on a stone set up at the entrance into the eastern gōpura, left side

summary.p: This is dated on Śaka 1532, Kollam 787, (= A.D. 1610), Chittirai, ba, 10, Wednesday, Śatabhishaj. It registers an agreement of Timmappa-Mudaliyār, Kumārasvāmi-Mudaliyār, the merchants and the NATTavar of PAppānguḷam making over certain incomes derived by them in their division (māgaṇai), permanently for the conduct of a festival in the temple of TiruvannIśuramuḍaiya-Tambirānār situated on theStops here. bank of the VannitIrtham (tank), for the merit of Muttu-Vīrappa-NAyaka son of Vīrappa-NAyaka and grandson of Viśvanātha-NAyaka (of Madura), and of Śevvandi-Śeṭṭiyār son of MUrtti-Śeṭṭiyār. This Śevvandi-Śeiṭṭyār was evidently a local administrative officer under the chief.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śakāttam 1000 5 100 3 10 2
Itaṉmel cellāniṉṟa ko
llam 7 100 8 10 7 varuṣam cittirai [ māsam]
Amarapakkiṣattu daśamiyum puta
ṉvāramum catapiṣānakṣattira
mum brāhmayokamum vaṇi
jakaraṇamum peṟṟa cataiyattu
nāḷ ceyta caṟuvamāṉiyappiṟamā
ṇamāvatu muḷḷināṭṭu vaṭamel
piṭākai kiḻpaṟṟilp pāppāṅkuḷa
ttil pāttāṟṟil vaṉṉitirttakkarai
yil Eḻuntaruḷiyirukkum nayi
ṉār tiruvaṉṉicuramuṭaiya tam
pirāṉāṟku tiruviḻā naṭakkump
paṭikku śrīmatu vicuvaṉātaṉāyakkar
virappaṉāyakkar muttuvirappaṉā
yakkar Ayyaṉavarkaḷukkup puṇi
yamākavum murtti ceṭṭiyār cevva
nti ceṭṭiyāravarkaḷukkup puṇ
ṇiyamākavum timmappa mutaliyā
ravarkaḷum kumāracuvāmi mutaliyā
rum Attāntiramuṅ kaṭaikkūṭṭi
kaḷum pāppāṅkuḷam nāṭṭavarumo
m nayiṉār tiruvaṉṉicuramuṭaiya
tampirāṉāṟku Eṅkaḷ mākaṇaikku
ḷ naṭakkappaṭṭa teyvatāyam nañ
cai puñcai puṉakkuḷam veṭṭuttiru
ttu Ārāmam Ivai mutalāṉa samasta
ppiṟāttikaḷukkum poṟuppuccaṟuva
māṉiyappiṟamāṇam paṇṇikkuṭu
ttom Ituve caṟuvamāṉiyap
piramāṇamākac cempiluñ cilai
yilum veṭṭi cantirātittavarai
tiruviḻā naṭattikkoṇṭu varuvā
rkaḷākavum Intap puṇṇiya
ttaip paripāliṉam paṇṇi naṭa
tti varukiṟavarkaḷ keṅkaik ka
raiyile Acuvametiyākam pa
ṇṇiṉa palattaiyuñ civappi
ṟatiṭṭai paṇṇiṉa palattaiyu
m civacāyucciyamum peṟakkaṭa
vārākavum Intap puṇṇiyattu
kku Akutam paṇṇukiṟavarka
ḷ keṅkaikkaraiyile kārām
pacuvaik koṉṟa toṣattilum
brahmasasti śrīvatai paṇṇi
ṉa toṣattilun taṉ mātā
pitāvaik koṉṟa to[ṣatti]
lum kuruvaik koṉṟa toṣa
ttilum pokakkaṭavārākavum U
dānapālanayo rmmadhye dānā
t śṛeyonupālanam dā
nāt svargamavāpnoti pā
lanāda ccutam padam . svadattām
paradattām vā yo hara ti va
sundarām ṣaṣṭirkharṣasasasrāṇi
viṣṭāyām jāyate krimiḥ ..
śubhamastu vaṉṉināyakar tuṇai .
Digital edition of SII 23.122 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
